name: bullseye
description: Build automation with Bullseye target dependency graphs and SimpleExec. Create .NET build scripts as dotnet file-based scripts with no project boilerplate. Use when creating build.cs files, defining build targets, automating build/test/pack/publish steps, using forEach for test matrices, integrating System.CommandLine with Bullseye, or comparing Cake/Nuke/FAKE with simpler alternatives.
